risks.title: Bulk lesson import without dedupe
risks.mitigation: Use stable pathwayId+slug; run dedupe reports; incremental batches only

risks.title: Client-side paywall bypass
risks.mitigation: Server getUserAccess / resolveEntitlement — never import routes that skip gates

risks.title: External legacy mirror unavailable
risks.mitigation: Mount/copy NurseNest mirror; re-run external scan

risks.title: Schema mismatch for legacy record shape
risks.mitigation: Park in holding JSON + import-reports; transform before Prisma write
